notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the php SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 2 CVEs: CVE-2020-28949, CVE-2020-36193.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document

document.title: php security update for CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6
